title: phlomoides dshungarica
intro: Phlomoides dshungarica, also known as Kyrgyz mint or Dzungar mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This perennial herb is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, particularly in Kyrgyzstan and China, and is prized for its medicinal properties. Phlomoides dshungarica is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to reap its health benefits and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
